note: Real captured optical-PPG ADC bursts. No multi-minute raw PPG exists locally: the WHOOP straps stream a per-second 24-sample burst, not a continuous buffer, and neither the local store nor the cloud mirror persists a contiguous high-rate waveform. Samples are raw AC-coupled ADC counts (PPG has no absolute unit) exposed verbatim.

primary.label: WHOOP 5.0 v26 verified optical PPG (autocorrelation locks to heart rate)

contiguous.label: WHOOP 4.0 v25 historical PPG - 3 consecutive-second records concatenated (72 samples, ~3 s). Longest contiguous real optical capture available. NOTE: the exact PPG byte-span on v25 is unpinned in-repo; bytes [25:73] (pre-gravity@73) are used. Real optical ADC region, but do NOT derive HR from it (concatenation artifact).
